title: Sparkling Happy Engagement Prism Banner (3.6 Meters) 1 Piece - Celebration Banner for Memorable Moments
features: ENGAGEMENT PRISM BANNER: Celebrate your memorable moment in style with this stunning, eye-catching banner that perfectly complements your engagement party's atmosphere.
GORGEOUS SPARKLING DESIGN: Reflects light beautifully for an added touch of elegance, turning any space into a magical and festive environment for the lovely couple and their guests.
PERFECT LENGTH: Ensures ample coverage for decorating your party venue, making a lasting impression on friends and family, and capturing picture-perfect memories.
EASY-TO-USE BANNER: Quick and hassle-free setup, allowing you more time to focus on planning the rest of your special day and enjoying the party with loved ones.
IDEAL CELEBRATION ACCESSORY: Make your engagement unforgettable with this spectacular banner that adds a festive touch, enhancing the ambiance and creating lasting memories for years to come.
description: Product Description Celebrate the start of your happy new life together with our Prismatic Foil "Happy Engagement" Banner. 1 Banner - 12 ft. This prismatic foil banner features a "Happy Engagement" headline, a ring with pink and blue heart prints on a holographic background. Perfect as a photography backdrop on your engagement party, adding a fun and beautiful decoration to your venue. Made of durable material that is easy to assemble and hang up. This banner can be reused and easily stored to use in the future. Box Contains 1 x Banner
